goldSynthesisSection: Legal NLP / prose-to-proof (grounded context + citation output contract)

No agent Skill prompt-template owner exists for this disclaimer/sources contract.

goldSynthesisSection: Legal NLP / prose-to-proof (deterministic regex pre-tagger feeding CandidateClaim spans)
rationale: A deterministic regex legal-entity pre-tagger (statute/case/court/legal-term via matchAll → char-span CandidateClaim seeds) is the LOGIC-side deterministic extractor; no such extractor exists in @beep/nlp, and it belongs in the deterministic-doc-structure sibling exploration coordinated with @beep/nlp, with court patterns cross-linked to court-vocabulary-resolver.

goldSynthesisSection: RAG / retrieval projection (local-first embeddings)
rationale: A local-first legal embedding pipeline (zero server round-trip, Tauri-webview capable) is the rebuildable embedding/projection tier of rag-retrieval-projection per the seed's local-ONNX-embeddings note; only the embedding-pipeline wiring is gold.

goldSynthesisSection: Legal NLP / prose-to-proof (clause extraction prompt → CandidateClaim)
rationale: Risk-scored clause extraction with a strict 'respond ONLY with valid JSON' contract extends the active langextract span-grounded extraction goal (clause-as-candidate-with-risk prompt) rather than starting fresh; CandidateClaim already owns the candidate schema.
cautions: gold echoes 'exact text of the clause' but emits NO offsets — beep extension MUST add source char spans to satisfy the provenance wall

goldSynthesisSection: Legal NLP / prose-to-proof (resilient structured-output parsing)
rationale: Balanced-bracket JSON recovery from chatty LLM output is already implemented in @beep/anthropic repair (Anthropic.repair.ts) and agents BlockRepair (AnthropicTurnKernel) — repo already owns this capability.
cautions: reference-only; do not re-port — beep's forced-tool repair tail supersedes a bracket-counting recovery routine

goldSynthesisSection: Legal NLP / prose-to-proof (anti-inference 'LLM as pure OCR' discipline)
rationale: Canonical anti-inference / 'extract EXACTLY as written, DO NOT infer' prompt discipline — the retrieval-side gold langextract needs; per the locked-decision routing this is Case A (anti-inference pure-OCR prompt mode) which EXTENDS langextract-capability, not the deferred-streaming sibling.
cautions: BAML is BoundaryML's external Apache-2.0 DSL/runtime — port the anti-inference prompt PATTERN + field-by-field class breakdown, do NOT adopt the BAML runtime or copy code

goldSynthesisSection: Legal NLP / prose-to-proof (Partial-candidate vs Complete-authoritative streaming gate)
rationale: The Partial(candidate)/Complete(authoritative) streaming gate is the net-new piece; langextract V1 SPEC explicitly DEFERS streaming (locked decision), so it cannot extend langextract and routes to the deterministic-doc-structure sibling per the locked-decision routing.
cautions: @beep/agents AnthropicTurnKernel + @beep/langextract Service already implement the candidate-then-finalize adapter shape (study as reference, do NOT re-port)
Partial/Complete gate CONFLICTS langextract V1's streaming-deferral lock — needs a standards decision
BAML external Apache-2.0

goldSynthesisSection: Knowledge graph / agent memory (versioned-edge temporal extraction prompt)
rationale: The temporal-knowledge extraction prompt's NEVER-overwrite/always-version edge discipline + directness-weighting (1.0 explicit / 0.5 inferred / 0.1 speculative) maps to the bitemporal-edges memory wedge, which the completed epistemic gate explicitly deferred; reuse the prompt SHAPE only.
cautions: agentmemory is Apache-2.0 but plain TS+Zod (DI/Layer patterns do NOT transfer)
do NOT copy the brittle parseTemporalGraphXml regex parser — reuse prompt shape and ADD exact char-span grounding (the XML scheme lacks it)
bitemporal store + rejected/superseded states were explicitly DEFERRED by goals/epistemic-claim-lifecycle-gate

goldSynthesisSection: Legal NLP / prose-to-proof (docket/serial-number normalization skill + eval corpus)
rationale: Few-shot docket-number normalization (guidelines + ~55 input→output examples + tie-breaker) is explicitly uspto-aligned (USPTO application/serial numbers behave the same); routes to the uspto-patent-driver-depth wedge as a normalization skill + eval-fixture corpus over the existing ODP driver's number-normalization surface.
cautions: courtlistener cl/ code is AGPL — reimplement the prompt; reuse the example corpus only as test fixtures if license permits, else regenerate
do NOT reintroduce PatentsView/PEDS — keep aligned to ODP data.uspto.gov

goldSynthesisSection: Legal NLP / prose-to-proof (closed-struct extraction contracts)
rationale: extra='forbid' (additionalProperties:false) closed-struct + annotated-description extraction discipline is already owned by the schema kit + epistemic.CandidateClaim effect/Schema (closed structs + annotations) — Pydantic analog is a dup.
cautions: reference-only; the schema-kit + CandidateClaim already enforce closed structs and field-guidance annotations

goldSynthesisSection: RAG / retrieval projection (near-dup candidate-evidence clustering before the gate)
rationale: MinHash/LSH near-dup clustering of candidate holdings/prior-art is a NEW similarity capability (@beep/nlp has cosine/Tversky/phonetic but no LSH dedup); its purpose — collapse repetitive evidence and rank most-described ideas before the human gate — is a retrieval-side projection/ranking concern.
cautions: courtlistener cl/ code is AGPL — reimplement MinHash/LSH from the datasketch algorithm (num_perm=64, threshold 0.5), do not copy source
new LSH Tool lands in @beep/nlp but the dedup-before-gate consumer is the rag/epistemic boundary

goldSynthesisSection: Legal NLP / prose-to-proof (court-name normalization vocabulary)
rationale: The variables.json regex-template dictionary (fuzzy OCR/abbreviation-tolerant court-name fragments) is the regex normalization vocabulary at the heart of the court-vocabulary-resolver wedge; no such vocabulary exists in packages/ or @beep/data.
cautions: courts-db is BSD-2 (permissive, attribution-friendly) — safe to vendor the dataset/regex dictionary with attribution; resolver logic reimplement-don't-copy

goldSynthesisSection: Legal NLP / prose-to-proof (span-gated court-string resolver)
rationale: find_court_ids_by_name's partial-match span gating (reject matches whose span length != full string length) is exactly the char-offset logic for GroundedExtraction.span when canonicalizing court mentions to IDs; core resolver algorithm of the court-vocabulary-resolver wedge.
cautions: courts-db BSD-2 — reimplement resolver in Effect; reuse the @beep/epistemic GroundedExtraction.span primitive rather than a parallel span type

goldSynthesisSection: Legal NLP / prose-to-proof (court/jurisdiction entity-resolution index)
rationale: gather_regexes' 'compiled pattern + (id,name,type,location,parent) metadata tuple' index is the entity-resolution index pattern the court-vocabulary-resolver mirrors in Effect to resolve mentions to graph IDs with downstream-filter metadata.
cautions: courts-db BSD-2
graph-shape Court/Jurisdiction nodes remain owned by goals/ip-law-knowledge-graph — this wedge owns the vocabulary/index only

goldSynthesisSection: Legal NLP / prose-to-proof (deterministic contract-structure extraction with char offsets)
rationale: Pure-regex contract-structure extraction (defined terms, cross-refs, parties, amendments) where every row carries verbatim text + char offsets and NO model is in the loop is the deterministic LOGIC-side complement to langextract; no such extractor exists in @beep/nlp — the canonical seed for the deterministic-doc-structure exploration.
cautions: doc-haus is MIT (safe to study/adapt)

keep the extractor provider-neutral and span-bearing (out of drivers); feed GroundedExtraction → epistemic.CandidateClaim and law-practice Claim/Distinction/party models; built-in versioned re-extraction migration is worth porting

goldSynthesisSection: Legal NLP / prose-to-proof (caption-line normalization before structure parse)
rationale: Per-jurisdiction caption separator alignment (§ Texas, : NY, ) most courts) is a deterministic normalization that improves downstream caption/party parsing — a low-value but clean preprocessing step for the deterministic-doc-structure extractor.
cautions: doctor is BSD-2 (adapt with attribution)
reference-grade / low value — fold in only if caption parsing is in the extractor's first slice

goldSynthesisSection: Legal NLP / prose-to-proof (docket/document-number extraction + provenance linkage)
rationale: Regex extraction of the court-applied header-stamp docket document number (Document:/Doc:/DktEntry:) grounds a filing to its docket entry — a deterministic extractor feeding @beep/provenance source linkage; the pdfplumber header-stamp isolation (font/position filter) is the layout-aware-PDF piece owned by file-processing-capability.

header-stamp isolation needs layout-aware PDF extraction — coordinate with goals/file-processing-capability's deferred OCR/PDF-diagnostics layer rather than rebuilding it here

goldSynthesisSection: Legal NLP / prose-to-proof (deterministic-first then LLM-refine pipeline)
rationale: Layered heuristic-then-LLM classification (cheap deterministic pass first, LLM only as fallback/refinement) is the concrete tiered-confidence wiring of beep's hard wall (deterministic/SHACL logic first, LLM only proposes); it is the orchestration pattern that binds the deterministic doc-structure extractor to the langextract LLM-refine pass.

goldSynthesisSection: Legal NLP / prose-to-proof (fuzzy-candidate vs exact-ID entity resolution)
rationale: Fuzzy name→entity resolution with a confidence threshold + integer-bypass to authoritative CourtListener person-ID is the candidate-vs-authority resolution pattern for linking extracted names to graph entities; lands in the court-vocabulary-resolver wedge as judge/court entity resolution against the CourtListener authority.

judges are adjacent to the court/jurisdiction vocabulary scope — generalize the candidate-vs-ID pattern

rationale: Six structured patent-analysis prompt workflows (prior_art_search, patent_validity, competitor_portfolio, ptab_research, freedom_to_operate, patent_landscape) are IP-attorney agent Skills; agentic-professional-runtime explicitly scopes 'agents, skills, commands' and 'patent/trademark/copyright work', so these add new Skill-content scope to that ACTIVE runtime over the uspto driver + anthropic kernel.

goldSynthesisSection: MCP / agent skills (EPO CQL + BigQuery + ODP query-syntax grounding resource)
rationale: The EPO CQL fields/operators/limits + ODP free-text + BigQuery SEARCH/UNNEST cheat-sheet is query-construction grounding knowledge feeding the uspto-patent-driver-depth query-DSL + net-new EPO/BigQuery work; lands as a prose→patent-query grounding resource on the uspto driver wedge.

goldSynthesisSection: Legal NLP / prose-to-proof (context-budget overlapping chunker)
rationale: Context-budget-sized overlapping chunking that prefers clean newline breaks is the long-document chunker beep lacks (@beep/nlp has ChunkBySentences/Paragraphize but no context-budget overlap chunker); per the RAG rationale the chunker piece attaches to langextract for map-reduce extraction before the candidate gate.
cautions: source lacks char-offset tracking — beep's span-grounded extraction REQUIRES an offset-preserving chunker carrying charStart/charEnd; add offsets when porting to TS
coordinate the offset-preserving chunker with rag-retrieval-projection so there is one chunker, not two

goldSynthesisSection: Provenance & grounding (prose→normalized-citation CandidateClaim)
rationale: The CourtListener citation-lookup endpoint (free-text blob in → normalized_citations with char offsets out) is beep's prose→candidate-citation flow exactly; the citation-as-CandidateClaim-with-spans capability is the citation-grounding guard, while building the bare @beep/courtlistener driver around the endpoint is owned by gov-legal-data-driver-codegen.

rationale: A structured 102/103/101 invalidity-analysis prompt orchestrating PFW + PTAB + Citations with explicit data-availability gating and a mandatory verification-first step is an IP-attorney agent Skill scaffold; adds new Skill scope to the ACTIVE agentic-professional-runtime composing the uspto driver + anthropic kernel.
